task_completion.description: Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The EColi FoodHistory dataset is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data source 'FoodHistory' or record count '359' is visible in the Analysis window interface.

task_completion.description: HAMBURGER and ILLDUM are used in the TABLES command.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The command 'TABLES HAMBURGER ILLDUM' is visible in the command pane, or the output clearly indicates these two variables were cross-tabulated.

task_completion.description: The 2x2 contingency table displays counts for exposed/unexposed cases and controls.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2x2 grid in the output area shows numerical counts for the combinations of HAMBURGER and ILLDUM.

task_completion.description: The odds ratio and 95% confidence interval are displayed in the output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output area explicitly shows 'Odds Ratio' along with its calculated value and a 95% Confidence Interval.

task_completion.description: The chi-square statistic and p-value are displayed in the output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output area shows 'Chi-Square' statistic values and corresponding p-values.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the genuine Epi Info 7 software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis interface, not a text editor, web browser, or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not manually type the expected statistical results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The statistical outputs are rendered within the Epi Info 7 output pane as a result of a command, not manually typed text in a document.

integrity.description: Verifies the results come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The command pane shows the TABLES command or the dialog box was used to generate the output, rather than just displaying a pre-existing image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. The dataset is the EColi FoodHistory table. The exposure variable is HAMBURGER (TEXT, 'Y'/'N') and the outcome variable is ILLDUM (SHORT integer). The TABLES command in Epi Info 7 generates a 2x2 contingency table, odds ratio with 95% CI, chi-square test statistic, and p-values. The VLM should verify these specific statistical outputs appear in the Epi Info 7 output pane.
